Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Bryant Fleming plans, [ca. 1904-1937]
Collection Number: 1380

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Bryant Fleming plans, [ca. 1904-1937]
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
1380
Abstract:
Sketches, plans, details, and blueprints of landscaping projects for parks, private estates, and housing projects from Fleming's landscape architecture firms.
Creator:
Fleming, Bryant, 1877-1946.
Quanitities:
27 cubic feet.
54 mapcase folders.
Language:
Collection material in English
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE

Landscape architect.
Bryant Fleming received a B.S. from Cornell University in 1901. He formed Townsend & Fleming in Buffalo, New York (1905), and dissolved the partnership in 1915 when he established an independent practice in Wyoming, New York. He moved his office to Ithaca in 1927, where he continued his practice until retirement in the late 1930s. Fleming taught as a visiting professor at Cornell, and he helped develop the Department of Landscape Architecture. He was also involved in campus planning at Cornell and was an active member of the American Society of Landscape Architects' Committee on Education.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Sketches, plans, details, and blueprints of landscaping projects for parks, private estates, and housing projects from Fleming's landscape architecture firms. Includes working papers of buildings by various architects, including the Avery Coonley Estate in Illinois by Frank Lloyd Wright.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Bryant Fleming plans, #1380. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials

See also the Bryant Flemming scrapbook, collection #37-5-4299.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Wright, Frank Lloyd, 1867-1959.
Townsend & Fleming
Subjects:
Landscape architecture.
Avery Coonley House (Riverside, Ill.)
Architecture.
Form and Genre Terms:
Blueprints.
Architectural drawings.

Scope and Contents
This is most helpful if you want the list by plan number. Please check back to online finding aid for the most accurate location information.
Contents
  1. List of drawings by geographic location - Pages 3-9
  2. List of drawings by last name of client (sheet numbers grouped) - Pages 10-16
  3. List of drawings by last name of client (each sheet number listed individually) - Pages 17-35
  4. List of drawings by sheet number - Pages 36-74
  5. Handwritten list of drawings - Pages 75-131
  6. Additional lists and indices - Pages 132-143
